title: Akzo Nobel India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Akzo Nobel India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Akzo Nobel India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Quality Control Engineer to join our dynamic team in Ludhiana. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Akzo Nobel India:
Akzo Nobel India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Akzo Nobel India!
